sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65461" key="megalopoli/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-πολίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n65461.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">citizen of a large city</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
